commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
<template>
  <view class="navbar">
    <view class="mthealth">麦田健康</view>
    <view class="nav-links">
      <view
        class="nav-link"
        v-for="item in navList"
        :key="item.name"
        :class="{ active: current === item.name }"
        @click="navigate(item)"
      >
        {{ item.name }}
      </view>
    </view>
  </view>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  props: {
    current: String, // 当前激活项
  },
  data() {
    return {
      navList: [
        { name: '首页', url: '/pages/index/index' },
        { name: '运动广场', url: '/pages/square/index' },
        { name: '运动福利', url: '/pages/benefits/index' },
        { name: '个人中心', url: '/pages/user/index' },
        { name: '登录', url: '/pages/login/index' },
      ],
    };
  },
  methods: {
    navigate(item) {
      if (item.url !== this.$page.fullPath) {
        uni.navigateTo({ url: item.url });
      }
    },
  },
};
</script>

<style scoped>
/* 样式略，保持你原有的即可 */
.navbar {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 20rpx;
}
.nav-link {
  padding: 10rpx 20rpx;
  color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
}
.nav-link.active {
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: bold;
  position: relative;
}
.nav-link.active::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: -4rpx;
  left: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 40rpx;
  height: 4rpx;
  background-color: #00c6ff;
  border-radius: 2rpx;
}
</style>
